title: Home-to-school travel: data collection
body: "The Department for Education (DfE) is collecting data from all local authorities on:   home-to-school travel travel provided for those in post-16 education and training   This guidance is for local authorities to support them in completing the data collection and covers:   how to access the collection which pupils to include definitions of types of travel   "

taxons.title: School food, accommodation, transport and uniform
